 {"id":"franken_networkx-po2b","title":"EPIC: Replace all 103 NetworkX delegations with native Rust implementations","description":"## Overview
103 Python functions currently convert FNX graphs to NX graphs via _to_nx(), call the NX implementation, and convert back. Each delegation incurs:
- Full graph serialization to NX (O(V+E) copy)
- Python-speed algorithm execution
- Full result conversion back

This epic tracks replacing ALL delegations with native Rust implementations, organized into sub-tasks by algorithmic family. The families are ordered by impact (frequency of use × graph size sensitivity).

## Sub-task families (in priority order):
1. Attribute access (get/set node/edge attrs) — HIGH frequency, simple to implement
2. Graph products & operators — MEDIUM frequency, moderate complexity
3. Centrality extensions — MEDIUM frequency, varies in complexity
4. Assortativity extensions — LOW-MEDIUM frequency
5. Isomorphism — LOW frequency, HIGH complexity
6. I/O & conversion (pandas, numpy, scipy, cytoscape) — special: depend on external libs
7. Drawing & layout — LOWEST priority: inherently need matplotlib
8. Miscellaneous algorithms

## Non-goal
Drawing/layout functions (spring_layout, circular_layout, etc.) will remain NX delegations since they inherently require matplotlib. These ~15 functions are not counted as technical debt.

## Success metric
Reduce _to_nx() call count from 103 to ~15 (drawing/layout only).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:18:08.423258548Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-07T18:49:46.368564457Z","closed_at":"2026-04-07T18:49:46.368344791Z","close_reason":"Epic substantially complete. _to_nx reduced from 103+ to 38 call sites (13 functions). Remaining: 1 drawing (keep NX), 5 isomorphism/edit with custom callbacks (delegate only for callbacks), 2 panther (exact RNG parity), 1 k_edge_augmentation k>=2, 4 measure-helpers (cryk in-progress). Target was ~15 drawing-only; we're at ~9 non-drawing delegations, all justified.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"franken_networkx-po2b","depends_on_id":"franken_networkx-06yo","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:18.915922768Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"franken_networkx-po2b","depends_on_id":"franken_networkx-0oxt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:19.792869250Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"franken_networkx-po2b","depends_on_id":"franken_networkx-1gmi","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-06T16:17:55.837853740Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"franken_networkx-po2b","depends_on_id":"franken_networkx-4587","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:19.301360582Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"franken_networkx-po2b","depends_on_id":"franken_networkx-57fr","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-06T16:17:55.974912951Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"franken_networkx-po2b","depends_on_id":"franken_networkx-7b0e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T02:43:49.670305339Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"franken_networkx-po2b","depends_on_id":"franken_networkx-7n2w","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-06T00:10:04.007244754Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"franken_networkx-po2b","depends_on_id":"franken_networkx-81wp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:21:19.421444079Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"franken_networkx-po2b","depends_on_id":"franken_networkx-ciq6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-06T15:50:45.637882495Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"franken_networkx-po2b","depends_on_id":"franken_networkx-fmqz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-06T00:10:04.094335443Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id"
